metadata.description: Managed-autonomy workflow for Claude Code: 11-step loop with audit/critique skills, four-lens parallel staff-review, diff-focused security + a11y reviews (with per-diff early-exit on docs-only PRs), agent-isolated planner + docs helpers, project-config-driven ship + ship-spike pipelines with stale-base preflight gate. v1.2.5 sharpens the reviewer pipeline along adversarial dimensions: auditor + plan-critic gain a prove-or-disprove self-check that drops findings without specific evidence; lens-staff-engineer reads adversarially ('assume the diff is broken'); /flow:security-review shifts to red-team identity ('find an exploitable vulnerability') with a trace-input-source disprove step.

plugins.name: flow
plugins.description: Managed-autonomy 11-step loop. Bundles the skeptical reviewers (auditor + plan-critic), the four-lens parallel staff-review (engineer / UX-designer / design-engineer / push-further), diff-focused /flow:security-review + /flow:accessibility-review, /flow:ship + /flow:ship-spike pipelines, /flow:workflow-help, /flow:doctor verification skill, planner + docs context-isolation agents, portable rules (general, plan-discipline, documentation, exploration), memory-corpus tool, flow.config.json JSON Schema (16 slots), and default hooks. v1.2.5 sharpens the reviewer pipeline along adversarial dimensions: auditor + plan-critic gain a prove-or-disprove self-check (findings must survive an attempt to cite the specific session text or third citation that would invalidate them); lens-staff-engineer reads adversarially ('assume the diff is broken — what's the most likely break?') for higher correctness recall; /flow:security-review shifts to red-team identity ('find an exploitable vulnerability') with a trace-input-source-back disprove step. Plan-critic also gains fan-out hunt vocabulary in Internal incoherence (PR-G FOLLOW-UP #5).
